evals.name: api-route-auth-audit
evals.prompt: Security review — I added a new dashboard API route for deleting bookings.
evals.expected_output: Checks requireAuth or equivalent, Zod validation, plan gates, P0/P1 findings, SHIP gate.

evals.name: webhook-signature-check
evals.prompt: Is our payment webhook handler secure for production?
evals.expected_output: Verifies signature/hash, idempotency, no secret logging, replay protection.

evals.name: cron-bearer-required
evals.prompt: Review the new cron job that sends reminder emails.
evals.expected_output: P0 if cron route lacks Bearer CRON_SECRET pattern.

evals.name: trigger-should-security
evals.prompt: secrets audit before we deploy this API change

evals.name: trigger-should-not-brand
evals.prompt: does this landing page copy match our brand voice?
